title: Tenderly Baked French Pistachio Gratin
description: A rich and creamy paleo-friendly dish featuring pistachio paste, perfect for a lazy Sunday in Brittany. This floral and shattering gratin is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the pistachio paste, coconut cream, salt, and duck fat until well combined.
Add the fresh thyme and garlic to the bowl and stir until the mixture is smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the paleo-friendly flour and eggs.
Add the flour and egg mixture to the pistachio mixture and stir until a thick batter forms.
Pour the batter into a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until it is golden brown and set.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
